bird.name: 格氏丛莺
bird.summary: 格氏丛莺（台湾作格爾氏灌木鶯，学名：Graueria vittata），是雀形目长嘴莺科的一种鸟类，属于单型的格氏丛莺属（学名：Graueria）。 特征 格氏丛莺体重约15.54克，翼长约61毫米，喙宽度约3.9毫米，喙厚度约3.5毫米，嘴峰长约15.7毫米，跗蹠长约18.5…

locations.name: Albertine Rift montane forests
locations.summary: The Albertine Rift montane forests (French: Forêts montagnardes du Rift Albertin) is a tropical moist broadleaf forest…

relations.evidence: Townsend|last26=Robbins|first26=Mark B.|last27=Sheldon|first27=Frederick H.|last28=Silveira|first28=Luís Fábio|last29=Smith|first29=Brian Tilston|last30=White|first30=Noor D.|last31=Moyle|first31=Robert G.|last32=Faircloth|first32=Brant C.|title=Earth history and the passerine superradiation|journal=Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences|volume=116|issue=16|year=2019|pages=7916–7925|issn=0027-8424|doi=10.1073/pnas.1813206116|pmid=30936315|pmc=6475423|doi-access=free|bibcode=2019PNAS..116.7916O }} It is native to the Albertine Rift montane forests
